Message: Reactive showcase renders official semantic pages with stateful counter.
Reactive forms block shows required, pattern, password, and textarea validation surfaces.
Reactive appearance block shows backdrop blur, filter blur, flex wrap, RTL text, and image skin samples.
Reactive selector and stack labs validate advanced selectors plus transformed z-index hit alignment.
Reactive Phase 2 visual lab shows multi-background, multi-shadow, dashed border, mask, and clip-path in one native card.
Reactive Phase 3 text lab shows multilingual copy, RTL alignment, ellipsis, and text decoration in one native panel.
Reactive Phase 4 image lab shows CSS background-image url, SVG image rendering, and native canvas drawing in one panel.
Reactive Phase 5 keyframe lab captures the initial animation state from CSS files.
Reactive keyframe lab advances to a deterministic mid-frame.
Reactive Phase 5 keyframe lab shows mid-animation color, blur, and opacity interpolation.
Reactive keyframe lab reaches the deterministic end frame.
Reactive Phase 5 keyframe lab shows the finite animation end state and alternate fill behavior.
Reactive transition probe enters focus state on the same DOM node.
Reactive transition runtime advances native tween interpolation.
Reactive transition probe shows mid-animation color and opacity interpolation.
Reactive scroll host consumes native wheel input.
Reactive scroll container clips content, updates offsets, and keeps clip host bounded.
Reactive keeps collection selection on item 2 for the focused crop.
Reactive table block shows native table semantics, content-aware columns, rowspan, and colspan.
Reactive counter increments via state update.
Reactive counter rerender is visible.
Reactive opens modal overlay.
Reactive overlay state becomes visible.
